summary: Session 1: empty-manifest validity landed. Both modules: [] and bare modules: (plus every YAML 1.2 core null spelling and quoted keys) now read as a VALID empty manifest and behave exactly like an absent one across all four S3 authoring flows (no QuickPick, no module: stamp, no notice); the format-preserving appender grows an empty manifest into its first block-style entry via guard-validated textual line replacement (root-indented forms, trailing comments, and nested modules: keys handled); the canonical always-present modules.yaml template (Set 087 header comments + commented examples + modules: []) ships as MODULES_YAML_TEMPLATE, round-trip tested, with scaffold/ensure-write wiring deferred to Set 094; malformed manifests keep the fail-loud abort; rendering byte-stable (attribution pinned identical across absent/empty forms). Verification: 5 rounds — R1 root-indentation Major fixed, R2 nested-key Major fixed, R3 null-spelling Major fixed, R4 disputed and third-provider adjudicated (gemini-pro, s1-third-opinion-empty-forms.json) as adjudicated-minor residual with quoted-key hardening applied, R5 VERIFIED zero findings. Residual (adjudicated-minor, deferred to Set 092-094 manifest guardrails): exotic empty-list serializations (multiline flow lists, tags, anchors) classify valid-empty but refuse loudly with the copyable entry block, no write.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (s1-next-orchestrator-analysis.json, gemini-pro tier 2): S2's visible-module computation is multi-conditional model-layer logic and the compat matrix + armed advisory path-aware critique are synthesis tasks above a Sonnet-class seat; Opus-class at medium effort is the cheapest-capable step-down from the Mythos-class seat. Operator owns the final seat choice.

adjudications.finding: s1-issues-round-4.json — 'appender still rejects semantically valid empty-flow manifests' (quoted keys, multiline flow lists), rated Major by gpt-5-6
adjudications.third_opinion: s1-third-opinion-empty-forms.json (gemini-pro): ADJUDICATED-MINOR RESIDUAL — quoted-key hardening applied and test-pinned; remaining exotic serializations refuse loudly with the copyable entry block (fail-loud posture, no write, no corruption); CST rewrite rejected as re-litigating the settled routed architecture ruling; residual deferred to the Set 092-094 manifest-guardrails work.
